pr.title: Non-record: Sequential TTT + Memorization Analysis (val_bpb=1.0476, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: Uses SwiGLU+EMA quantized weights with sequential score-then-train TTT and sliding-window diagnostics to isolate adaptation vs memorization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trains/updates weights via sequential test-time training on validation chunks.
techniques: Sequential score-then-train TTT on non-overlapping val chunks
Sliding-window eval on adapted weights for memorization analysis
Int5 quantization plus EMA on SwiGLU architecture
